segments.scene_description: A stationary view from ground level on a cyberpunk city sidewalk, where two individuals sit against a wall beside a busy multi-lane street. Heavy futuristic traffic flows continuously past metal guardrails, while towering glass buildings and a prominent pink neon sign dominate the background. Occasional pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, passing the seated figures who shift positions occasionally.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary ground-level perspective of a bustling cyberpunk sidewalk where the urban chaos contrasts with a moment of stillness. It begins with a view of two individuals resting against a wall, their occasional shifts in position grounding the scene amidst the surrounding activity. As the camera lingers, heavy futuristic traffic flows in a continuous stream past metal guardrails, creating a blur of motion against the static architecture. The scene then expands upward to reveal towering glass buildings and a prominent pink neon sign that dominates the skyline. Finally, the composition is completed by the intermittent passage of pedestrians who drift across the sidewalk, weaving through the neon-lit environment.
